zh.Shelton, South Norfolk District, Norfolk: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登
zh.Fressingfield, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可福雷辛費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Brewse於1412年出生在英國諾福爾可薩勒時，她的父親Sir Robert Brewse43歲，母親Ela Stapleton30歲。她於1429年與John Shelton, Esq.在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1479年在英國諾福爾可享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Brewse于1412年出生在英国諾福爾可薩勒时，她的父亲Sir Robert Brewse43岁，母亲Ela Stapleton30岁。她于1429年与John Shelton, Esq.在英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1479年在英国諾福爾可享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登。

nameMeanings.name: Brewse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German and Danish   Kruse   or Dutch   Kroese  .

variants.name: Cruse
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name probably from an unidentified place in Normandy named with Old French crues, crus, creus ‘hollow’. Creuse (in Somme, Picardy) and Cruys-Straëte (formerly in Flanders, now in the French département of Nord), which have the same etymology, are alternative possibilities but seem less likely on geographical and tenurial grounds.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English crus(e) ‘bold, fierce’, although the regular development would be to Crowse (rhyming with house).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Brewse was born in 1412, in Salle, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Robert Brewse, was 43 and her mother, Ela Stapleton, was 30. She married John Shelton, Esq. in 1429, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1479, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Brewse est née en 1412, à Salle, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Brewse, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Ela Stapleton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John Shelton, Esq. en 1429, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1479, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Brewse 1412 in Salle, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Brewse 43 und ihre Mutter Ela Stapleton 30. Sie hat 1429 in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom John Shelton, Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1479 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Norfolk, England und wurde in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Brewse è nata il nel 1412 nel Salle, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Brewse, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Ela Stapleton, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato John Shelton, Esq. nel 1429, nel Shelton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1479, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Shelton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Brewseが1412年にイギリスノーフォルクサルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Brewseは43歳，母Ela Stapletonは30歳であった。1429年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンでJohn Shelton, Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1479年にイギリスノーフォルクで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Brewse(이)가 1412년 영국 노르폴크 샐일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Brewse(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela Stapleton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셸턴에서 John Shelton, Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1479년 영국 노르폴크에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셸턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Brewse nasceu em 1412, em Salle, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Brewse, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Ela Stapleton, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com John Shelton, Esq. em 1429, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1479, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Brewse родилась в 1412 г. в местности салл, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Brewse было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Ela Stapleton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Shelton, Esq. в 1429 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1479 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Brewse nació en 1412, en Salle, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Brewse, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Ela Stapleton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con John Shelton, Esq. en 1429, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1479, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
